reasoning_top2: Moderation/interaction claim with small per-cell samples (n=43, 45) and borderline z=2.14, p<.05 — interactions are notoriously underpowered and replicate worse than main effects.
2015 consumer psychology with small samples and self-help-style framing fits the profile of findings that have struggled in large-scale replications like ManyLabs/RP:P.
